description: [ELON] Create webhook receiver endpoints for orders/create, orders/updated, and products/update. Verify HMAC signatures using Shopify secret. Parse webhook payload, extract sales data (order_number, total_price, line_items, created_at, customer info), and insert into new shopify_orders table. Log webhook receipt in activity_log. Handle idempotency using webhook event_id to prevent duplicate processing.
successCriteria: HMAC signature verification passes for authentic webhooks
Order data inserted into shopify_orders table
Duplicate webhooks detected and skipped (idempotency check)
